subcodes.first_line: O thou two attracted ones to the fragrances of God and enkindled by the fire of the love of God, thou two sincere ones in the Cause of God
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المنجذبان بنفحات الله و المشتعلان بنار محبه الله المخلصان فی امر الله
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @prayer for the departed, @Shrines and Holy places, @praise and encouragement, @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
